purpose: This workbook serves as a centralized reporting tool to aggregate and summarize statutory, tax, and GAAP reserves for LNBAR 2024 Employee Benefits (EB) products. It processes raw policy-level data to provide management with key financial metrics including face amounts, cash values, and policy counts by product subtype.

columns: Net Tax Reserves - Total 2018 - General Account
Net Tax Reserves - Total 2018 - Separate Account

tables.business_purpose: Data table grouped by Product Subtype, RBC C2 Product Category.

columns.definition: Raw source value or input column for Accounting Date.
Dimension label identifying the row taxonomy for Product Subtype.
Dimension label identifying the row taxonomy for RBC C2 Product Category.
Raw source value or input column for Statutory Reserves - Total - General Account.
Raw source value or input column for Statutory Reserves - Total - Separate Account.
Raw source value or input column for Reinsurance Statutory Reserve - Total.
Raw source value or input column for Captive Statutory Reserve - Total.
Raw source value or input column for Net Statutory Reserves - Total.
Raw source value or input column for GAAP Reserve - Total.
Raw source value or input column for Non-TAI Reinsurance GAAP Reserve - Total.
Raw source value or input column for Face Amount - Base.
Raw source value or input column for Face Amount - Addl Term Rider.
Raw source value or input column for Face Amount - Ceded.
Raw source value or input column for Cash Value - General Account.
Raw source value or input column for Policy Number.

columns.column_name: Net Tax Reserves - Total 2018 - General Account
columns.definition: Raw source value or input column for Net Tax Reserves - Total 2018 - General Account.

columns.column_name: Net Tax Reserves - Total 2018 - Separate Account
columns.definition: Raw source value or input column for Net Tax Reserves - Total 2018 - Separate Account.
Raw source value or input column for Net Tax Reserves - Total 2018.
Raw source value or input column for Captive Tax - Reserve - Total 2018.
Raw source value or input column for GAAP Reserve - Total_1.
Raw source value or input column for Non-TAI Reinsurance GAAP - Reserve - Total.

tables.business_purpose: Summarizes statutory reserve components including General Account, Separate Account, and 3rd party adjustments for specific product subtypes.
measures: LFG Net 3rd Party Total STAT Reserve
inter_table_relationships: Uses row 9 as a check row to ensure data integrity against total calculations.

columns.definition: The specific category of the insurance product being analyzed.

columns.formula_pattern: SUM(SQL_data[Statutory Reserves - Total - General Account]) GROUP BY [Product Subtype]
columns.definition: The total statutory reserve held in the General Account for the specified product subtype.

ultimate_raw_sources: SQL_data :: Statutory Reserves - Total - General Account

columns.formula_pattern: SUM(SQL_data[Statutory Reserves - Total - Separate Account]) GROUP BY [Product Subtype]
columns.definition: The total statutory reserve held in the Separate Account for the specified product subtype.

ultimate_raw_sources: SQL_data :: Statutory Reserves - Total - Separate Account

columns.formula_pattern: SUM(SQL_data[Reinsurance Statutory Reserve - Total]) GROUP BY [Product Subtype]
columns.definition: The portion of the statutory reserve attributable to third-party reinsurance arrangements.

columns.column_name: LFG Net 3rd Party Total STAT Reserve
columns.formula_pattern: STAT Reserve[LFG Gross GA STAT Reserve]+STAT Reserve[LFG Gross SA STAT Reserve]-STAT Reserve[3rd Party STAT Component]
columns.definition: The net statutory reserve position calculated by adjusting gross reserves for third-party components.

computation_params.expression: STAT Reserve[LFG Gross GA STAT Reserve]+STAT Reserve[LFG Gross SA STAT Reserve]-STAT Reserve[3rd Party STAT Component]

ultimate_raw_sources: SQL_data :: Statutory Reserves - Total - Separate Account
SQL_data :: Statutory Reserves - Total - General Account
SQL_data :: Statutory Reserves - Total - Separate Account
SQL_data :: Statutory Reserves - Total - General Account

columns.formula_pattern: -1 * SUM(SQL_data[Captive Statutory Reserve - Total]) GROUP BY [Product Subtype]
columns.definition: The total statutory reserve value specifically for the LNBAR 2024 EB portfolio.

columns.formula_pattern: SUM(SQL_data[Net Statutory Reserves - Total]) GROUP BY [Product Subtype]
columns.definition: The final net statutory reserve amount after all adjustments.

tables.business_purpose: Breaks down the total statutory reserves by the flexibility of the product subtype.
inter_table_relationships: Uses row 9 as a check row to ensure data integrity against total calculations.

columns.definition: The specific category of the insurance product being analyzed.

columns.formula_pattern: -1 * SUM(SQL_data[Captive Statutory Reserve - Total]) WHERE [RBC C2 Product Category = 'Flexible'] GROUP BY [Product Subtype]
columns.definition: Statutory reserve portion associated with flexible product features.

columns.formula_pattern: -1 * SUM(SQL_data[Captive Statutory Reserve - Total]) WHERE [RBC C2 Product Category = 'Non-Flexible'] GROUP BY [Product Subtype]
columns.definition: Statutory reserve portion associated with non-flexible product features.

tables.business_purpose: Aggregates tax-basis reserves for General and Separate accounts to determine the net tax reserve position.
inter_table_relationships: Uses row 16 as a check row to ensure data integrity against total calculations.

columns.definition: The specific category of the insurance product being analyzed.

columns.formula_pattern: SUM(SQL_data[Net Tax Reserves - Total 2018 - General Account]) GROUP BY [Product Subtype]
columns.definition: Net tax reserves held within the General Account.

computation_params.sum_column: Net Tax Reserves - Total 2018 - General Account

direct_inputs.column: Net Tax Reserves - Total 2018 - General Account

ultimate_raw_sources: SQL_data :: Net Tax Reserves - Total 2018 - General Account

columns.formula_pattern: SUM(SQL_data[Net Tax Reserves - Total 2018 - Separate Account]) GROUP BY [Product Subtype]
columns.definition: Net tax reserves held within the Separate Account.

computation_params.sum_column: Net Tax Reserves - Total 2018 - Separate Account

direct_inputs.column: Net Tax Reserves - Total 2018 - Separate Account

ultimate_raw_sources: SQL_data :: Net Tax Reserves - Total 2018 - Separate Account

columns.formula_pattern: SUM(SQL_data[Net Tax Reserves - Total 2018]) GROUP BY [Product Subtype]
columns.definition: The combined net tax reserve for both General and Separate accounts.

columns.formula_pattern: -1 * SUM(SQL_data[Captive Tax - Reserve - Total 2018]) GROUP BY [Product Subtype]
columns.definition: The specific tax reserve allocation for the LNBAR 2024 EB portfolio.

tables.business_purpose: Summarizes GAAP benefit reserves, adjusting for non-TAI third-party components.
measures: LFG Gross Total GAAP Ben Reserve
LFG Net of Non-TAI GAAP Ben Reserve
inter_table_relationships: Uses row 23 as a check row to ensure data integrity against total calculations.

columns.definition: The specific category of the insurance product being analyzed.

columns.column_name: LFG Gross Total GAAP Ben Reserve
columns.formula_pattern: SUM(SQL_data[GAAP Reserve - Total]) GROUP BY [Product Subtype]
columns.definition: The gross GAAP benefit reserve before third-party adjustments.

columns.formula_pattern: SUM(SQL_data[Non-TAI Reinsurance GAAP - Reserve - Total]) GROUP BY [Product Subtype]
columns.definition: The GAAP reserve component related to non-TAI third-party reinsurance.

ultimate_raw_sources: SQL_data :: Non-TAI Reinsurance GAAP - Reserve - Total

columns.column_name: LFG Net of Non-TAI GAAP Ben Reserve
columns.formula_pattern: SUM(LFG Gross Total GAAP Ben Reserve) + SUM(Non-TAI 3rd Party GAAP Component)
columns.definition: The net GAAP benefit reserve after accounting for non-TAI components.

ultimate_raw_sources: SQL_data :: Non-TAI Reinsurance GAAP - Reserve - Total

columns.formula_pattern: GAAP Ben Reserves[LFG Net of Non-TAI GAAP Ben Reserve]
columns.definition: The specific GAAP benefit reserve allocation for the LNBAR 2024 EB portfolio.

computation_params.points_to_column: LFG Net of Non-TAI GAAP Ben Reserve

direct_inputs.column: LFG Net of Non-TAI GAAP Ben Reserve

ultimate_raw_sources: SQL_data :: Non-TAI Reinsurance GAAP - Reserve - Total
SQL_data :: Non-TAI Reinsurance GAAP - Reserve - Total

tables.business_purpose: Calculates the net face amount of insurance policies, including base coverage and additional term riders.
measures: LFG Gross Face Amount - Addnl Term Rider
inter_table_relationships: Uses row 31 as a check row to ensure data integrity against total calculations.

columns.definition: The specific category of the insurance product being analyzed.

columns.formula_pattern: SUM(SQL_data[Face Amount - Base]) GROUP BY [Product Subtype]
columns.definition: The base face amount of the insurance policies.

columns.column_name: LFG Gross Face Amount - Addnl Term Rider
columns.formula_pattern: SUM(SQL_data[Face Amount - Addl Term Rider]) GROUP BY [Product Subtype]
columns.definition: The face amount associated with additional term riders.

ultimate_raw_sources: SQL_data :: Face Amount - Addl Term Rider

columns.formula_pattern: -1 * SUM(SQL_data[Face Amount - Ceded]) GROUP BY [Product Subtype]
columns.definition: The face amount ceded to or covered by third parties.

columns.formula_pattern: Face Amount[LFG Gross Face - Base]+Face Amount[3rd Party Face Base & Riders]
columns.definition: The net face amount after adjusting for third-party coverage.

computation_params.expression: Face Amount[LFG Gross Face - Base]+Face Amount[3rd Party Face Base & Riders]

columns.formula_pattern: Face Amount[LFG Net Face]
columns.definition: The total face amount for the LNBAR 2024 EB portfolio.

computation_params.expression: Face Amount[LFG Gross Face - Base]+Face Amount[3rd Party Face Base & Riders]

tables.business_purpose: Reports the General Account cash value for the specified products.
inter_table_relationships: Uses row 38 as a check row to ensure data integrity against total calculations.

columns.definition: The specific category of the insurance product being analyzed.

columns.formula_pattern: SUM(SQL_data[Cash Value - General Account]) GROUP BY [Product Subtype]
columns.definition: The total cash value held in the General Account for the policies.

tables.business_purpose: Provides a simple count of policies per product subtype.
inter_table_relationships: Uses row 45 as a check row to ensure data integrity against total calculations.

columns.definition: The specific category of the insurance product being analyzed.

columns.formula_pattern: COUNT(SQL_data) GROUP BY [Product Subtype]
columns.definition: The total number of policies associated with the product subtype.
